creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sat Jun 22 16:30:34 2013
New Revision: 321580
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321580

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.12
  
  Note from maintainer:
  
    This is the last release for 1.1. Port will be updated to 1.2.x
    once twitter/netflix approve it for production usage.
  
  PR:		ports/179822
  Submitted by:	Radim Kolar <hsn@sendmail.cz>

Modified:
  head/databases/cassandra/Makefile
  head/databases/cassandra/distinfo
  head/databases/cassandra/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/cassandra/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/cassandra/Makefile	Sat Jun 22 15:52:44 2013	(r321579)
+++ head/databases/cassandra/Makefile	Sat Jun 22 16:30:34 2013	(r321580)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	cassandra
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.11
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.12
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
 MASTER_SITES=	APACHE
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	cassandra/${PORTVERSION}

==============================================================================
--- head/databases/cassandra/distinfo	Sat Jun 22 15:52:44 2013	(r321579)
+++ head/databases/cassandra/distinfo	Sat Jun 22 16:30:34 2013	(r321580)

+SHA256 (apache-cassandra-1.1.12-bin.tar.gz) = 3600f6e86e76974b38b2bf90fabff99ab2a443f444d55a93f3c677c8edbe3785
+SIZE (apache-cassandra-1.1.12-bin.tar.gz) = 12974200
